subcodes.first_line: By the life of God! Whosoever heareth mention of Me shall surely lament the tribulations that have befallen Me at the hands of those who have denied the Books of God and His Messengers [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لعمر الله من یسمع ذکری ینوح بما ورد علی من الذین کفروا بکتب الله و رسله فی
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement, @hypocrisy
